title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 622.220 - Copies of official documents evidence of originals, when
text:
622.220.  Copies of official documents evidence of originals, when. — Copies of all official documents and orders filed or deposited according to law in the office of the division, certified by an administrative law judge or by the division director to be true copies of the originals, under the official seal of the division, shall be evidence in like manner as the originals.
(L. 1996 S.B. 780)
